data.body: REPLAN_ESCALATE: All done definitions for this story (DD1, DD2, DD5) require hardcoding the string 'plugins/dso/' inside doc-writer.md and test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh. doc-writer.md is a distributed plugin agent file — every host project that installs DSO receives it. Hardcoding the host-project install path 'plugins/dso/' in a distributed artifact is architecturally impossible to satisfy correctly. Reverted commit 3eacc31c which added a test assertion expecting this constraint in doc-writer.md. The story as written cannot be implemented without violating the plugin boundary it is trying to enforce. Needs brainstorm re-examination: the correct enforcement mechanism for distributed plugin files must use host-agnostic language (e.g., the plugin install root as a variable, or a convention such as 'this plugin directory') rather than a hardcoded host-project path.
